title: stachys betifolia
intro: Stachys betifolia, also known as Betony, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Betony include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of headaches and digestive issues. Betony is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions, salves, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
